## Description

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Checklist
- [ ] PowerShell syntax check passes (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Script still runs end-to-end and produces a valid JSON + HTML report
- [ ] New checks follow the `Finding` pattern and degrade gracefully on query failure
- [ ] New evidence/risk/recommendation text added to the `T` dictionary
- [ ] No network calls, telemetry, or external dependencies added
- [ ] README updated if needed
